# DwellPraise

> One Gospel, Many Platforms. A Christian ministry cultivating dwelling places for God through structured, intentional content.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/index.html): Main hub and introductory portal.
- [About](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/about.html): Our mission, vision, and core ministry goals.
- [Media Hub](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/media.html): Video and audio resources spanning multiple platforms.
- [Encounter Generosity](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/generosity.html): Empowering businesses and relieving urgent needs through structured generosity.
- [Contact](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/contact.html): Get in touch with the DwellPraise ministry team.

## What We Do
DwellPraise is a digital ministry that distributes the Gospel across multiple platforms including YouTube, Substack, Instagram, Bluesky, X (Twitter), and WhatsApp. We create sermons, worship content, podcasts, and community stories.

## Social Presence
- YouTube: https://m.youtube.com/@dwellpraise
- Substack: https://substack.com/@dwellpraise
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dwellpraise
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/dwellpraise.bsky.social
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/dwellpraise
- WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8ASUxC6ZvcQiTnL83a
